pi_items.source: NinjaTrader 8 documentation confirms standard path structure: %USERPROFILE%\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\templates\<category>. Docker is confirmed as Windows username in env.json
Task description specifies this as the template name. Represents Interactive Brokers per-share commission model.

Interactive Brokers official pricing page (https://www.interactivebrokers.com/en/pricing/commissions-stocks.php) confirms $0.005 per share is current rate for IBKR Pro Fixed plan and specific IBKR Lite trade types with $1.00 minimum
Interactive Brokers official pricing confirms $1.00 minimum commission for $0.005 per share tier

NinjaTrader 8 commission template documentation describes these as the standard terminology for per-share/per-unit commission types (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/adding_per_instrument_commissi_2.htm)
Task description specifies this as the template name for Charles Schwab commission model

Charles Schwab historical pricing: $4.95 per trade was the standard rate from March 3, 2017 to October 7, 2019 (https://www.cnbc.com/2019/10/01/charles-schwab-is-eliminating-online-commissions-for-trading-in-us-stocks-and-etfs.html). Currently (2024/2025) Schwab charges $0 for stock trades, but this is a valid historical rate used for educational/simulation purposes
NinjaTrader 8 documentation confirms these are standard terminology for fixed/flat commission per-trade types (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/adding_per_instrument_commissi_2.htm)

NinjaTrader 8 includes this as a built-in sample strategy demonstrating moving average crossover logic. Forum posts and documentation confirm it is an open-source reference strategy (https://forum.ninjatrader.com/forum/ninjascript-file-sharing/ninjascript-file-sharing-discussion/1126945-atsquadrostrategybase-nt8-strategy-foundation-with-samplemacrossover)

SPY is the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust, a real and widely traded instrument. Environment description confirms real Yahoo Finance data for SPY from 2023-2024. Data file verified: /examples/ninja_trader_env/data/SPY.Last.txt contains OHLCV data from 2023-01-03 to 2024-12-31
Task description specifies backtest should use 'IB_PerShare' commission template for Strategy Analyzer

privileged_info_summary: The task configures two realistic commission templates in NinjaTrader 8: (1) 'IB_PerShare' with $0.005 per share and $1.00 minimum, matching Interactive Brokers' current IBKR Pro Fixed pricing; (2) 'Schwab_PerTrade' with $4.95 per trade, which was Charles Schwab's historical rate from 2017-2019 but is now outdated (Schwab currently charges $0). The strategy uses SampleMACrossover, a built-in NinjaTrader 8 reference strategy, with SPY instrument and real OHLCV data spanning 2023-2024. The metadata directory path follows NinjaTrader 8 standard structure with Windows user 'Docker'. All configuration targets are realistic and either current or historically accurate trading commission models.
